news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance Launches QBTZ: The First 2X Short ETF for D-Wave Quantum Inc

holdings.infoBox: QBTZ is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash Offset stock at 245.78%, OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 40.31%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 21.05%, US DOLLARS at 7.12%, and First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 1.32%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2x Short QBTS ETF (QBTZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to provide 2x inverse exposure to the daily share price movement of D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS), less fees and expenses. QBTZ was launched on Oct 6, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
